name: Patient 40
history: Recent move and settling stress. Difficult relationship with judgmental, unsupportive mother. Strained friendships contributing to isolation.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: No one is there for me when I need support.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm completely alone in dealing with life's challenges.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of contact, attempting tasks alone, isolation.
situation: Feeling exhausted after attempting to unpack without support. Avoiding contact with friends and mother.
auto_thought: I have to do everything alone because no one cares enough to help.
behavior: Attempt unpacking alone, then avoid contacting others.
